vocab.meaning: phong cảnh nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: I was mesmerized by the unspoilt landscape of the highlands, where nature remains in its purest form.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng/nhìn ngắm (thường dùng cho thứ gì đó tráng lệ)
vocab.example: The sunrise over the grand canyon was a sight to behold, leaving everyone in complete silence.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp siêu thực/thanh tao (như không thuộc về thế giới này)
vocab.example: The mist rolling over the lake at dawn gave the scenery an ethereal beauty that I'll never forget.
The image of the turquoise sea clashing against the white cliffs is forever etched in my memory.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn bao quát/toàn cảnh rộng lớn
vocab.example: From the peak of the mountain, we were treated to a panoramic vista of the entire valley below.

vocab.meaning: vùng hoang dã nguyên khôi/sạch sẽ
vocab.example: Hiking through the pristine wilderness of the national park was a deeply spiritual experience for me.

vocab.meaning: khiến tôi không thốt nên lời
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the snow-capped peaks was enough to leave me speechless for several minutes.
The sunset painted the sky in vibrant hues of crimson and gold, creating a truly unforgettable view.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí thanh bình/tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: What made the coastal view so memorable was the serene atmosphere and the gentle sound of the waves.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc cho các giác quan (trải nghiệm tuyệt vời)
vocab.example: The terraced rice fields in harvest season are a feast for the senses, with their golden colors and fresh earthy scent.
